Video.summary: Jen dejará a John por amante secreto, Jerry de 73 ańos. Danika confiesa ser hombre a su prometido en sorpresa.
Video.title: Relaciones amorosas extrańas

Image.alt: Relaciones amorosas extrańas
Relaciones amorosas extrańas
Relaciones amorosas extrańas

Video.summary: After Cassarah became Tim’s live-in nanny, they began a sexual relationship. Her family is livid over the 26 year age gap and claims that he takes her to swingers’ parties. Can Steve help Cassarah leave this dysfunctional relationship?
Video.title: I Seduced My Teenage Nanny

Image.alt: I Seduced My Teenage Nanny
I Seduced My Teenage Nanny
I Seduced My Teenage Nanny

Video.summary: Jeremy and Amber assault each other daily, and he questions whether he is the father of her baby girl; upon learning that his ex has a baby who might be his, Jeff convinced her to move across the country to be with him, then kicked them out.
Video.title: DNA: Emotions Out of Control

Image.alt: DNA: Emotions Out of Control
DNA: Emotions Out of Control
DNA: Emotions Out of Control

Video.summary: At seventeen, Dimitrius has already had three children and now four additional women claim to be pregnant with his baby. Then Ethel and her daughters need Steve's help to right their wrongs and get their family back on track.
Video.title: Steve's Had Enough

Image.alt: Steve's Had Enough
Steve's Had Enough
Steve's Had Enough

Video.summary: Stephanie’s drug addiction led her to severely neglect and abuse their children. As Scott’s fiancée Amy has stepped in as a mother and Stephanie fails multiple drug tests, he doesn’t want her near the children, but wants her to atone for her wrongs!
Video.title: Mommy Hurt Me

Image.alt: Mommy Hurt Me
Mommy Hurt Me
Mommy Hurt Me

Video.summary: After Juanita’s mother was murdered, things became strange, especially when her father Eric didn’t attend the funeral. She believes he was involved in the murder, but her sister Nora thinks she’s crazy. Can Steve help put this mystery to bed?
Video.title: Dad, Did You Murder Our Mom?

Image.alt: Dad, Did You Murder Our Mom?
Dad, Did You Murder Our Mom?
Dad, Did You Murder Our Mom?

Video.summary: Eva claims Latosha's boyfriend, Tyrone, had sex with Latosha's daughter; Cynthia believes that Jacob cheated on her with numerous women.
Video.title: Did You Have Sex With My Niece and My Daughter?

Image.alt: Did You Have Sex With My Niece and My Daughter?
Did You Have Sex With My Niece and My Daughter?
Did You Have Sex With My Niece and My Daughter?

Video.summary: Violet's baby was brutally beaten to death by a caretaker; David says his estranged wife's story did not add up after their daughter suffered severe injuries.
Video.title: You Had to Know Your Child Was Being Abused!

Image.alt: You Had to Know Your Child Was Being Abused!
You Had to Know Your Child Was Being Abused!
You Had to Know Your Child Was Being Abused!

Video.summary: At 12, Crystal dated 20 year old Matt and was pregnant at 13. He served 15 months in prison for criminal sexual assault on a minor and is a registered sex offender. Are they a product of inappropriate love or just misunderstood?
Video.title: 22-Year-Old Marries 14-Year-Old Girl

Image.alt: 22-Year-Old Marries 14-Year-Old Girl
22-Year-Old Marries 14-Year-Old Girl
22-Year-Old Marries 14-Year-Old Girl

Video.summary: Cynthia says her two teen daughters are sexually active and out of control. She worries their actions will lead them to an early grave.
Video.title: I'm 15 and I Love Sex

Image.alt: I'm 15 and I Love Sex
I'm 15 and I Love Sex
I'm 15 and I Love Sex

Video.summary: After seven years of marriage and four kids, Evren and Crystal are still cheating on each other. Can their future really look any brighter! Then Sarah's not about to lose her first love Jeremy, but his cheating ways are reaching a boiling point!
Video.title: Face It...I Don't Want You!

Image.alt: Face It...I Don't Want You!
Face It...I Don't Want You!
Face It...I Don't Want You!

Video.summary: Tony confesses to his girlfriend that he is cheating on her with a transsexual. Mary confronts her transsexual roommate Shortee. Next, Limont confronts his one-night stand.
Video.title: Tales of the She-Males

Image.alt: Tales of the She-Males
Tales of the She-Males
Tales of the She-Males

Video.summary: Reno has been dating Lavan for 6 months but has had a secret for the entirety of their relationship. Now Reno is ready to reveal that she is actually a woman, not a man.
Video.title: Honey...I'm A Woman

Image.alt: Honey...I'm A Woman
Honey...I'm A Woman
Honey...I'm A Woman

Video.summary: Amber confronts Shavon; Will wants to be with his cousin Tereca.
Video.title: Cousin, Will You Be My Girlfriend?

Image.alt: Cousin, Will You Be My Girlfriend?
Cousin, Will You Be My Girlfriend?
Cousin, Will You Be My Girlfriend?

Video.summary: Jen is going to tell John that she is dumping him for her secret lover, 73 year old Jerry. Next Danika has a little surprise for her fiancé which she feels compelled to tell him that she's really a man.
Video.title: Bizarre Love Affairs

Image.alt: Bizarre Love Affairs
Bizarre Love Affairs
Bizarre Love Affairs

Video.summary: Bailey says she's proud that she's a prostitute but her boyfriend isn’t. Next Tina learns how her man, Lewis, is earning his income. Then..."Blimp the Pimp" is here today to tell his girlfriend that he wants her to go to work for him.
Video.title: Baby, I'm A Hooker

Image.alt: Baby, I'm A Hooker
Baby, I'm A Hooker
Baby, I'm A Hooker

Video.summary: Arianna learns that her girlfriend has another on the side; Anthony says he made a mistake in cheating on his girlfriend, but the other woman will stop at nothing to be with him.
Video.title: In Your Face Mistresses

Image.alt: In Your Face Mistresses
In Your Face Mistresses
In Your Face Mistresses

Video.summary: Shantell decided that she needs to fix her relationship with Kenneth so she's going to tell her mistress that it's over. Then Dean says that he wants to take their relationship to the next level, but Kendra's here to let Dean in on a little secret.
Video.title: Lesbian and Gay Affairs Confessed

Image.alt: Lesbian and Gay Affairs Confessed
Lesbian and Gay Affairs Confessed
Lesbian and Gay Affairs Confessed

Video.summary: Jamie is here today to confront her mother and they do indeed face off over Mom's bad behavior. Then Karla and Tiffany have a secret to confess to their respective husbands ... they're sleeping together!
Video.title: I'll Never Forgive You!

Image.alt: I'll Never Forgive You!
I'll Never Forgive You!
I'll Never Forgive You!

Video.summary: Deon says Frankie has been accusing her of cheating and suspects he’s trying to cover his tracks! Then, Tessie suspects that her baby-daddy Donnell has been cheating, so she started secretly recording his phone conversations!
Video.title: I Brought The Divorce Papers…Prove You’re Not Cheating!

Image.alt: I Brought The Divorce Papers…Prove You’re Not Cheating!
I Brought The Divorce Papers…Prove You’re Not Cheating!
I Brought The Divorce Papers…Prove You’re Not Cheating!

Video.summary: Recently Shandora found evidence that her boyfriend David had been cheating. When she confronted him, David blamed it on Pete. Later, aspiring singer Sassy met music producer Chris and he promised to make her a star. Instead of music, they made love.
Video.title: My Sister And I Need a Test...Are The Men We Love Cheating?

Image.alt: My Sister And I Need a Test...Are The Men We Love Cheating?
My Sister And I Need a Test...Are The Men We Love Cheating?
My Sister And I Need a Test...Are The Men We Love Cheating?

Video.summary: Tyrone claims Rona's mother was the neighborhood "hot girl", so he doesn't believe that she is his daughter. And later, Rebecca wants to find out if the rumors are true that 19- year old Tommy is truly her father Randy's son.
Video.title: I've Told You For 37 Years I'm Not Your Father!

Image.alt: I've Told You For 37 Years I'm Not Your Father!
I've Told You For 37 Years I'm Not Your Father!
I've Told You For 37 Years I'm Not Your Father!

Video.summary: Alexus claims that Michael is the father of her child, but she doesn't know that he is engaged. Later, Shanika's mom Rannie and her baby's father Oscar are scared for her life. They fear that Shanika has been prostituting and robbing men for money.
Video.title: Will My Sex Secret Tear My Family Apart

Image.alt: Will My Sex Secret Tear My Family Apart
Will My Sex Secret Tear My Family Apart
Will My Sex Secret Tear My Family Apart

Video.summary: Trisha Goddard continues her on-going series, Teen Girls: Bad Choices. Meet a 15-year old girl who claims she’s a pimp and is having relationships with men and women. Can Trisha intervene in time?
Video.title: Our 15 Year Old Daughter Is A Pimp…Please Help Us!

Image.alt: Our 15 Year Old Daughter Is A Pimp…Please Help Us!
Our 15 Year Old Daughter Is A Pimp…Please Help Us!
Our 15 Year Old Daughter Is A Pimp…Please Help Us!

Video.summary: Kiesh has caught her boyfriend Twon cheating before, but doesn’t have enough evidence to prove that he’s been sneaking around with her best friend! Then, Glenn loves his exotic dancer fiancée Kim, but suspects that she is doing more than stripping!
Video.title: I Need The Truth! Is My Fiancee Leading A Secret Double Sex Life?

Image.alt: I Need The Truth! Is My Fiancee Leading A Secret Double Sex Life?
I Need The Truth! Is My Fiancee Leading A Secret Double Sex Life?
I Need The Truth! Is My Fiancee Leading A Secret Double Sex Life?

Video.summary: Alicia dated John for 2 years before finding out he was a male exotic dancer named Temptation. Then April, who was born female, became Logan while she was married to Tom. During the show, Tom said that he did not want to continue being with Logan.
Video.title: Trisha Updates!

Image.alt: Trisha Updates!
Trisha Updates!
Trisha Updates!

Video.summary: Chad’s mother and sister, both named Tammy, claim his ex-girlfriend April cheated. They think she was with other men during the entire relationship and her 3 children may not be his. Later, Kira says her boyfriend Terry is a cheater!
Video.title: Secrets Revealed…I'm The Woman Your Man Is Cheating With!

Image.alt: Secrets Revealed…I'm The Woman Your Man Is Cheating With!
Secrets Revealed…I'm The Woman Your Man Is Cheating With!
Secrets Revealed…I'm The Woman Your Man Is Cheating With!

Video.summary: Tempestt believes Marquis has stolen money from her and cheated with other women! Then, 42-year-old Mary was just 13 when she met Mark, but now she’s unsure if her husband is cheating on her! What do the lie detector tests say?
Video.title: Is The Man I Love Cheating and Stealing From Me?

Image.alt: Is The Man I Love Cheating and Stealing From Me?
Is The Man I Love Cheating and Stealing From Me?
Is The Man I Love Cheating and Stealing From Me?

Video.summary: John is a stripper and Alicia wants to know if he's ever cheated on her with a woman at one of his shows. Then, Randy thinks that Wynter is with him for his money. But today she'll learn that he makes money by giving therapeutic sex massages!
Video.title: Choose Today. Me or Your Job In The Sex Industry!

Image.alt: Choose Today. Me or Your Job In The Sex Industry!
Choose Today. Me or Your Job In The Sex Industry!
Choose Today. Me or Your Job In The Sex Industry!

Video.summary: Mysti thought she found her ideal man in Mark until she started finding evidence that made her suspect he has been cheating. Then, Scott thinks his wife, Stacy, is cheating on him because he found fingerprint bruises on her inner thigh.
Video.title: I Consider You My Dad, I'm Praying You're Not Cheating On My Mom

Image.alt: I Consider You My Dad, I'm Praying You're Not Cheating On My Mom
I Consider You My Dad, I'm Praying You're Not Cheating On My Mom
I Consider You My Dad, I'm Praying You're Not Cheating On My Mom

Video.summary: Octavia wants to prove to her boyfriend, Mark, that he is the father of her 2-month old baby even though she cheated on him. And later, Tamara wants to prove to her ex-boyfriend, Thomas, that he is the father of her 5 year old son.
Video.title: 3 Angry Mothers…3 Babies…Who Is The Father?

Image.alt: 3 Angry Mothers…3 Babies…Who Is The Father?
3 Angry Mothers…3 Babies…Who Is The Father?
3 Angry Mothers…3 Babies…Who Is The Father?

Video.summary: Nina’s dying husband admitted to sleeping with her sister Nadia. Nadia claims she got an STD from sleeping with Nina’s husband Mike. Then, Eva suspects her fourth husband is cheating with her pregnant niece and is also the father of her baby!
Video.title: Before My Husband Died He Confessed He Slept With My Sister!

Image.alt: Before My Husband Died He Confessed He Slept With My Sister!
Before My Husband Died He Confessed He Slept With My Sister!
Before My Husband Died He Confessed He Slept With My Sister!

Video.summary: 21-year old Ashley says that her mom Jesseca's husband, which she met online, is a serial cheater. Then, are Amy and JD being torn apart by insecurity or infidelity? Will the truth be revealed in the lie detector tests?
Video.title: Help Me Prove My Mom's Husband Is A Cheater!

Image.alt: Help Me Prove My Mom's Husband Is A Cheater!
Help Me Prove My Mom's Husband Is A Cheater!
Help Me Prove My Mom's Husband Is A Cheater!
